questionsList.questionContent: Who was the priest that supported Adonijah's claim to the throne?
According to 1 Kings, how many years did it take Solomon to build the Temple of the Lord?
Which king of Israel was known for his extreme wickedness and for being the husband of Jezebel?
What was the name of the mountain where Elijah challenged the prophets of Baal?
Who succeeded Elijah as the prophet of Israel?
Which Syrian general was healed of leprosy after washing seven times in the Jordan River?
How many years did the famine last in Israel during the days of Elijah?
Which king of Judah was miraculously healed and given fifteen additional years of life?
What was the name of the man who refused to sell his vineyard to King Ahab?
Which prophet was taken up to heaven in a whirlwind and a chariot of fire?
Who was the son of Solomon who caused the kingdom to split into two?
Which king of Israel established two golden calves, one in Bethel and one in Dan?
Which queen mother attempted to destroy the entire royal seed of the house of Judah?
Who was the boy king hidden in the Temple for six years to escape Athaliah?
Against which Assyrian king did Hezekiah pray, resulting in the death of 185,000 soldiers by an angel?
Which king of Judah reigned the longest (55 years) and was initially very wicked but later repented?
Which prophet was known for 'the sound of a gentle whisper' after a wind, earthquake, and fire?
In which city did Solomon build his extravagant palace, which took thirteen years?
Which king of Israel was killed by Jehu after he was anointed by a young prophet?
What was the name of the Phoenician king of Tyre who provided cedar and gold for Solomon's projects?
Which daughter of the king of Tyre married Ahab and introduced Baal worship to Israel on a massive scale?
How many water jugs did Elijah have poured over the sacrifice and wood on Mount Carmel?
Who was the servant of Elisha who was struck with leprosy because of his greed?
Which king of Judah was famous for finding the Book of the Law in the Temple and leading a great spiritual reform?
To which city did Elijah flee when Jezebel threatened his life?
Which king of Israel was the father of Ahab and established Samaria as the capital?
Who was the widow that Elijah stayed with in Sidon during the famine?
What did Elisha ask for from Elijah before he was taken up?

answersList.value: A double portion of his spirit
To go to heaven with him

questionsList.questionContent: Which king of Aram (Syria) sent a letter and money with Naaman to the king of Israel?
What happened to the children (young men) of Bethel who mocked Elisha?), calling him 'Baldy'?

answersList.value: Two she-bears came out and mauled forty-two of them

questionsList.questionContent: Which king of Israel only reigned for seven days and then committed suicide seting the palace on fire?
Who was the prophet whose word about the end of the famine in Samaria was doubted by a king's official?
What did Josiah do when the Book of the Law was read to him?

answersList.value: He tore his clothes in repentance
He threw it into the fire

questionsList.questionContent: Which Babylonian king finally destroyed Jerusalem and the Temple in the 11th year of Zedekiah?
Who was the last king of Judah recorded in the Books of Kings?
Who was the prophetess consulted by Josiah for the Book of the Law?
Which king of Israel destroyed the house of Ahab in fulfillment of Elijah's prophecy?
How many bulls were prepared for the sacrifice on Mount Carmel?

answersList.value: Two (one for Baal, one for the Lord)

questionsList.questionContent: What happened to the axe head that fell into the Jordan River while Elisha was with a group of prophets?
Which king of Israel was known for his 'furious driving' of his chariot?
Who was the queen of Sheba who visited Solomon to test him with hard questions?
How many wives and concubines did Solomon have eventually?
Which prophet told Jeroboam I that he would be king over ten tribes using a torn robe?
Which city did Solomon build up specifically for his horses and chariots?
Who was the High Priest who found the Book of the Law inside the Temple?
Who was the counselor who advised Rehoboam to answer the people roughly?

answersList.value: The young men who grew up with him

questionsList.questionContent: Against which city did Josiah initiate a reform, even though it was in the territory of the former northern kingdom?
Which king of Israel was the owner of the Hill of Samaria before Omri bought it?
Who were the two pillars of the porch of the Temple named?
Which king of Israel was blinded and taken to Babylon after seeing his sons killed?
Who was the prophet that rebuked Ahab for Naboth's murder?
How many years did the widow's jar of oil and bin of flour not fail during the famine Elijah announced?

answersList.value: Until the Lord sent rain (approx 3.5 years)

questionsList.questionContent: What did Elisha do to heal the 'bad water' in Jericho?

answersList.value: He struck it with his mantle
He threw salt into the spring

questionsList.questionContent: Which king of Aram was murdered by Hazael with a wet cloth?), as predicted by Elisha?
In which city did Elijah encounter a chariot of fire?
How many descendants of Ahab did Jehu have killed in Samaria?), specifically the 'seventy sons'?
Who was the priest who crowned Joash king?
Who was the Assyrian king who captured Samaria and led Israel into exile in 722 BC?
Which king of Judah 'did right in the sight of the Lord' and even destroyed the bronze serpent Moses had made because the people offered incense to it?
What was the name of the place where Elisha died?

answersList.value: Not named (likely in Samaria or his home)

questionsList.questionContent: How many years did Solomon reign over Israel?
Who was the mother of Rehoboam?
Which king of Israel was known as 'the son of Nimshi'?),.
Who was the man who struck Ahab with an arrow 'at random' during the battle at Ramoth-Gilead?
How many prophets of Baal were there on Mount Carmel?
How many prophets of Asherah did Elijah challenge?

answersList.value: None (they didn't show up according to some readings)

questionsList.questionContent: Who was the 'head' of the prophets who hidden 100 prophets in caves?
Which city did Omri build and make the capital of Israel?
What was the name of the place where Josiah was killed in battle against Pharaoh Necho?
Who was the Babylonian governor appointed over the people of Judah after the destruction of Jerusalem?),.
Who was the king that Elijah told 'I have not troubled Israel, but you and your father's house have'?
Which king of Judah removed his grandmother Maakah from being queen mother because she made an obscene idol?),.
In which city did Solomon build the Temple?), specifically which mount?),.
Who was the High Priest that supported Solomon against Adonijah?
Who was the commander of Solomon's army after Joab was executed?
What did Solomon say he wanted above all things when God appeared to him in a dream at Gibeon?
What was the name of the woman whose son Elisha raised in Shunem?
Which king of Israel built the city of Jezreel where he had a second palace?
Which king of Israel was known for having seventy sons killed by the elders of Samaria?).
What was the name of the place where Zimri commit suicide?
Which king of Israel had a ivory palace mentioned in 1 Kings 22?),.
Who was the prophet who told Hezekiah he would die?),.
How many chariots and horsemen did Solomon have?
In which city did Elijah pray for the drought to end?
Which king of Aram was Hazael's son after Ben-Hadad?
Who was the man from Bethlehem who was known as the 'wisest' besides Solomon?),.
Which king of Israel was king when Elisha had his final prophecy and died?
How many times did Joash of Israel strike the ground with arrows when Elisha told him to?
Which kingdom fell first to a foreign power?),.
Who was the High Priest that led the revolt against Athaliah?
In which city did Elisha raise the Shunammite's son?
What did Elisha do when the widow had nothing but a jar of oil?

answersList.value: He told her to borrow jars from all her neighbors

questionsList.questionContent: Who was the prophet whose bones revived a dead man when he was thrown into his grave?
Who was the king that sought out Elisha for 'the chariot and horsemen of Israel'?
Which king of Judah was struck with leprosy for trying to burn incense in the Temple?),.
Which king of Judah had a sun-dial mentioned as a sign from God?
Who was the Assyrian officer who taunted the people on the walls of Jerusalem during Hezekiah's reign?
How many years was the exile to Babylon predicted to last?),.

In which city was the Temple of the Lord located?
